characters.appearance: 3D animated female character, young adult. Fair complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and reddish-brown hair styled in a neat updo. She has a smooth, stylized appearance typical of modern 3D animation.
characters.wardrobe: A light green turtleneck sweater and small gold stud earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult human female. Fair complexion, long straight dark brown hair, and dark eyes. She has a natural, unstyled look.
characters.wardrobe: A dark, possibly black or navy, turtleneck sweater.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, slightly hesitant when speaking, and engaged in the conversation.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Yes, a little. I am hunger. [Yes, a little. I am hunger.]
Character A says: No, no. You say: I am hungry. English में 'hunger' नहीं, 'hungry' बोलते हैं। [No, no. You say: I am hungry. In English you don't say 'hunger', you say 'hungry'.]
Character B says: I am hungry. [I am hungry.]
Character A says: What do you want to eat? [What do you want to eat?]
Character B says: I want a pizza margherita. [I want a pizza margherita.]
Character A says: That's good! And to drink? [That's good! And to drink?]
Character B says: I want a water. [I want a water.]
Character A says: Better: I would like some water, please. ज़्यादा polite लगता है। [Better: I would like some water, please. It sounds more polite.]
Character B says: I would like some water, please. [I would like some water, please.]
Character A says: Perfect! देखो, तुम्हारी English improve हो रही है। [Perfect! See, your English is improving.]
Character B says: Thank you. पर तुम कौन हो? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर तुम्हारी AI tutor हूँ। हम रोज़ ऐसे ही practice करेंगे और तुम confidence से English बोलने लगोगी। [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We will practice like this every day and you will start speaking English with confidence.]
Character B says: Ok, मैं Supernova अभी try करती हूँ। [Ok, I will try Supernova now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a conversational learning scenario.
- Demonstrates real-time correction and feedback.
- Introduces the AI tutor and the brand.
